title: Implement white/ivory design system tokens, typography, and global styles
completion_summary: Design tokens, typography, global styles done
acceptance_criteria: Tailwind theme extended with custom colors matching MASTER.md: primary #171717, accent #A16207, background #FFFBF5, muted #F5F0E8, card #FFFFFF, border #E8E0D5.
Google Fonts Amatic SC and Cabin loaded in layout or CSS with preconnect.
CSS custom properties (--color-*) mirror Tailwind tokens.
Spacing, shadow, and radius tokens from MASTER.md applied.
Body background uses ivory/cream and text uses near-black with WCAG AA contrast.
No generic Bootstrap blue or unrelated color palettes used.
